heading: Assign Custom Roles
body:
You can assign custom roles in the Atlas UI when you [Configure Database Users](add-mongodb-users) or [modify a database user](modify-mongodb-users). To assign custom roles through the
Atlas Administration API, see [Create a Database User](api/doc/atlas-admin-api-v2/operation/operation-creategroupdatabaseuser) or [Update a
Database User](api/doc/atlas-admin-api-v2/operation/operation-updategroupdatabaseuser).
